name: Lady Bird Johnson's Famous Lemon Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter or margarine with sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Beat in egg yolks, lemon juice, and lemon rind alternately with the cake flour mixture.
3. Stir in milk, vanilla, and beaten egg whites separately before folding them into the batter.
4. Pour the batter into a greased baking pan and bake at 350°F (175°C) until set.
5. Make the icing by mixing sugar and lemon juice, then spread over the cooled cake.
